criteria.description: The pure flag reader (is_saas_sync_enabled, saas_sync_disabled_message, SAAS_SYNC_ENV_VAR, _TRUTHY_VALUES, _DISABLED_MESSAGE) is relocated to CORE module core/saas_sync_config.py, which is the single canonical definition (stdlib-only import: os).
criteria.evidence: WP01 review (reviewer-renata, indep.): AST walk confirms new module imports only `from __future__ import annotations` + `import os`, carries __all__; grep -rn '^def is_saas_sync_enabled|^def saas_sync_disabled_message' src/ = exactly one of each, both in core/saas_sync_config.py. Scoped pytest test_integration_boundary.py+tests/saas/ = 56 passed; ruff + mypy --strict clean.

criteria.description: The sole CORE-set importer readiness/coordinator.py:237 is repointed to core.saas_sync_config; no CORE-set module imports saas.rollout or any INTEGRATION module.
criteria.evidence: WP01 review: grep -rn 'specify_cli.saas' src/specify_cli/{core,status,readiness,invocation}/ => no matches (exit 1); coordinator now imports core.saas_sync_config. test_no_core_imports_integration GREEN at final commit; independently reproduced RED at red-commit f4e6f0c2e (coordinator still on saas.rollout, module absent) → genuine red-on-base.

criteria.description: saas/rollout.py retained as a thin re-export shim (C-002); all re-export surfaces (saas/__init__, sync/tracker feature_flags, facades) keep resolving to the SAME objects (identity preserved).
criteria.evidence: WP01 review: saas.rollout, saas.__init__, sync.feature_flags, tracker.feature_flags all satisfy `is core` (same function objects). git diff -- tests/saas/test_rollout.py is EMPTY (unchanged) and its is-identity assertions pass within the 56-test run. saas/__init__.py untouched.

criteria.description: test_integration_boundary.py: ALLOWLIST emptied; test_allowlist_count_ratchet asserts len(ALLOWLIST) == 0 (not <= 1); stale positive-control removed; negative-control injection proof RETAINED (scanner non-vacuous).
criteria.evidence: WP01 review: ALLOWLIST = frozenset(); ratchet asserts == 0; negative-control (non-allowlisted sync.events import driven through real _scan_trees, asserted reported) retained ~lines 228-252; positive-control block removed; prose sweep grep clean. Boundary suite 56 passed.

criteria.description: ADR docs/adr/3.x/2026-06-26-1-core-integration-boundary.md records the exemption resolved: allowlist table empty, ratchet ==0, Confirmation items 2/3 resolved, negative bullet resolved, shim-depth note added, #2252 referenced.
criteria.evidence: WP02 review (reviewer-renata, indep.): cross-line grep -nzoE sweep of ADR => no stale <=1/single-remaining/exactly-one/at-most-one/one-structural-coupling; exemptions table empty (marker-only row); Confirmation item 2 = 'zero', item 3 checked + names #2252 + core/saas_sync_config.py; 'Exactly one exemption existed…' line verified past/resolved not current-state; shim-depth trade-off note present. test_no_legacy_terminology 3 passed.

criteria.description: Stability contract saas_rollout.md updated: Module line -> core/saas_sync_config.py (rollout.py noted as shim), semantics updated, rollout.py added to Backwards-Compatibility-Shims, version bumped + 'relocated by #2252'; frozen disabled-message text unchanged (C-003); file stays prose-only (round-trip parse-valid).
criteria.evidence: WP02 review: Module line names core/saas_sync_config.py; Version: 2 bump + 'relocated by #2252'; shims section updated; byte-frozen disabled message (line 39) UNTOUCHED in diff (C-003 preserved); grep -c '```' = 0 (prose-only, stays legacy-allowlisted). tests/contract/test_example_round_trip.py 24 passed / 3 skipped.
